title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PHILIPPINE CHILDREN'S MEDICAL CENTER IN QUEZON BOULEVARD, QUEZON CITY, TO PHILIPPINE PEDIATRIC HOSPITAL AND DEVELOPMENT CENTER

chunks.text:
H. No. 29693 / 88 OG No. 23, 3493 (June 8, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7403, April 14, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PHILIPPINE CHILDREN'S MEDICAL CENTER IN QUEZON BOULEVARD, QUEZON CITY, TO PHILIPPINE PEDIATRIC HOSPITAL AND DEVELOPMENT CENTER

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Philippine Children's Medical Center in Quezon Boulevard, Quezon City, is hereby changed to Philippine Pediatric Hospital and Development Center.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 14, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 14, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
